description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a combination of black, white, and wood-toned exterior finishes. The structure includes multiple rooms, large windows, and a spacious open-plan living area that extends to a wooden deck with a swimming pool. The front of the house has a driveway with two parked cars and a covered entrance. The rear section boasts a large outdoor patio area, partially covered by a sleek pergola, and ample space for outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing abundant natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and a swimming pool, featuring a sleek black, white, and wood exterior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway with two cars, the main entrance, and the open-plan living area leading to the wooden deck and pool.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden deck, swimming pool, and partially covered outdoor patio area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, deck, and the arrangement of rooms with large windows.
description_view_3: Front view with the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and a clear view of the symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
